Opening Prompt: I was charged twice for my service this month!
Variation Script: Customer escalates if not acknowledged within 20 seconds. Use empathy statements and offer resolution.

Opening Prompt: I was charged twice for my service this month!
Variation Script: Customer is satisfied after refund is offered and investigation is promised. Close with thank you.

Opening Prompt: I haven't had internet for 2 days now! This is unacceptable!
Variation Script: Customer is upset. Acknowledge quickly, offer troubleshooting steps. If resolved, confirm satisfaction.

Opening Prompt: I haven't had internet for 2 days now! This is unacceptable!
Variation Script: Customer is satisfied after technician visit is scheduled. Provide ticket number and timeline.

Description: Customer calls to check account balance
Opening Prompt: Hi, I'm just checking my balance and recent charges.
Variation Script: Customer shows interest in upgrade. Explain benefits and offer discount. Close sale when ready.

Description: Customer calls to check account balance
Opening Prompt: Hi, I'm just checking my balance and recent charges.
Variation Script: Customer is not interested. Respect decision, ask if anything else can help, close professionally.

Opening Prompt: I want to cancel my service. I'm switching to a competitor.
Variation Script: Customer is determined to leave. Listen to concerns, offer best retention option. If successful, note reason.

Opening Prompt: I want to cancel my service. I'm switching to a competitor.
Variation Script: Customer cancels despite offers. Process cancellation professionally, ask for feedback.

Description: Customer wants to add a payment method
Opening Prompt: I need to update my payment information on file.
Variation Script: Customer successfully adds new payment method. Confirm security measures and thank them.

Description: Customer wants to add a payment method
Opening Prompt: I need to update my payment information on file.
Variation Script: Payment method declined. Suggest alternative payment methods or ask for different card.
